title: Gendos Day Off
wikitext:
[]: Gendo's Day Off             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Fri Aug 28, 2009 2:25 pm When he's not working, being a badass, traveling, being a pimp, obsessing over Yui, acting creepy toward Rei, or ignoring his son, what do you think Gendo does in the little spare time he does have? I think that he has a hand puppet set of Eva related stuff in his desk. When no one is around, and when he has spare time, he takes his gloves off, puts the puppets on, then re-inacts battles while trying to imitate the sounds of roars and weapons. That would be funny if Fuyutsuki came in the door to check on him without knocking, and Gendo quickly did the "Gendo Pose" with the puppets still on his hands. What do you think he does?

[]:             Quote Post by Holy Diver » Fri Aug 28, 2009 2:40 pm He probably just practices his pose in the mirror between meetings and Angel attacks. Or, he watches old amateur sex tapes of him with Yui and just lets the magic happen.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri Aug 28, 2009 2:48 pm Either in his desk with his trademark pose, soaking his feet in his trademark pose, studying the Reiquariam... ...or Gendo goes to the night club that is just south of Tokyo-3 and dances his ass off to xtc . Now I want you all of you to picture Gendo dancing to it and let that image sink in.

[]:             Quote Post by Adekis » Fri Aug 28, 2009 3:06 pm Oh, he'd definitely go to a dance club, but I don't know about XTC. I think he'd dance to something a little more diabolical . And besides that, I can only say he probably watches Death Note reruns.

[]:             Quote Post by ath » Fri Aug 28, 2009 3:30 pm Adekis wrote: Oh, he'd definitely go to a dance club, but I don't know about XTC.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Fri Aug 28, 2009 4:06 pm He plays Abraham Lincoln in civil war reenactments. Seriously though, I have this mental image of Gendo as a bit of a beatnik in his off hours. Getting high with some top-quality opium or scotch, playing a little jazz or belting out some freeflow poetry slams. He probably reads a lot, but I suspect he's the sort to read the same few great books over and over rather than check out the latest bestsellers.

[]:             Quote Post by LiLi » Fri Aug 28, 2009 4:15 pm He knits.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Fri Aug 28, 2009 4:41 pm One must understand the mind of gendo ikari. is he has to poop he thinks " would yui like it if i shit myself?" the answer being no he goes to the pot. He doesnt take time of its not in the sencario. Though he might like star at the Rei tank or something creepy like that

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Aug 28, 2009 4:45 pm Surely, Gendo's day off involves banging an Akagi woman until her ancestors cry for mercy.

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Fri Aug 28, 2009 4:58 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Surely, Gendo's day off involves banging an Akagi woman until her ancestors cry for mercy.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Aug 28, 2009 6:22 pm schismatics wrote: May I sig this??

[]:             Quote Post by backseatjesus » Fri Aug 28, 2009 7:00 pm He's all up in that ass. Kaji's that is.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Fri Aug 28, 2009 7:12 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Surely, Gendo's day off involves banging an Akagi woman until her ancestors cry for mercy.

[]:             Quote Post by Captain_Morgan » Fri Aug 28, 2009 9:09 pm Gendo never takes a day off from being a badass.

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Fri Aug 28, 2009 9:11 pm I think Gendo probably doesn’t have much free time. He most likely keeps himself busy around the clock so he doesn’t have to focus on how miserable he is or on how much pain he’s causing his son and the other people around him, Gendo mite look like he’s made of stone but he most assuredly is not.

[]:             Quote Post by Captain_Morgan » Fri Aug 28, 2009 11:39 pm child of Lilith wrote: I think Gendo probably doesn’t have much free time. He most likely keeps himself busy around the clock so he doesn’t have to focus on how miserable he is or on how much pain he’s causing his son and the other people around him, Gendo mite look like he’s made of stone but he most assuredly is not.

[]:             Quote Post by Adekis » Sat Aug 29, 2009 12:03 am child of Lilith wrote: pain he’s causing his son...

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Sat Aug 29, 2009 12:13 am Adekis wrote: child of Lilith wrote: pain he’s causing his son...

[]:             Quote Post by Adekis » Sat Aug 29, 2009 12:19 am Sammaeloo wrote: You forgot self-performed puppet shows.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sat Aug 29, 2009 12:28 am Sammaeloo wrote: Also I wonder what he would do if he had a day off, but he had to go to an amusment park. Imagine him on a rollercoaster in "Gendo Pose" the whole time.
